travel-insurance.name: SafetyWing Travel Insurance
travel-insurance.description: Medical coverage for travelers worldwide. Covers emergency care, hospital stays, and evacuation.

vpn.name: NordVPN
vpn.description: Stay secure on public WiFi and access your home country's content while abroad.

wise.name: Wise (formerly TransferWise)
wise.description: Send and spend money abroad using real mid-market exchange rates with no hidden fees.

pocket-wifi.name: Pocket WiFi Rental
pocket-wifi.description: Unlimited mobile internet in your pocket. Rent a WiFi hotspot device for your entire trip.

sim.name: Airalo eSIM
sim.description: Instant eSIM for 190+ countries. Set up before you leave — no physical SIM card needed.
